title: Incredible
text: To sleep with these on are easy.  The sound amazing.  I am recovering and often times need music to go to sleep.  But previously struggled with comfort and price point...  these are worth the money spent.

title: It’s just ok ... I’d expect more from it .
text: It’s not what I expect from Sennheiser especially in this line of product . Secure fit but the sound is just as the same as those other in ear monitors that I’ve purchased and returned .  Mostly focused on mid range and high’s not much on the bass side, it doesn’t have that “ immersive “ feel when you’re wearing this type of earphones. I have used my old but reliable MP3 player that has a Full Sound technology and when I matched it with this earphones it doesn’t make up to it .

title: Sennheiser never disappoints.
text: Great seal. Strong bass. Decent highs. Thin soundstage. Great price.

title: Good budget buds.
text: Good for average music listening. Makes good ear seal to exploit bass but the upper midrange gets splashy. Sonic quality not on par with more expensive models but is adequate for those who need good sounding tossable buds on a budget.

title: Lasts forever, decent sound
text: I know there's better out there, but it's a pretty solid sound quality. Also, where I normally go thru earbuds like most people drink coffee, I had its predecessor pair for over 10 years. The ONLY reason I'm finally replacing them is cuz a pet finally got a nibble on the cable. Even so they still work but I figured 10 years is long enough for a set of earbuds. :D

title: Veracity of claims....neutral.
text: The company boasts the highest quality in sound. I thought it was just ok. It doesn't compare to bose, or beats, by a long shot. But it is ok to just listen to music....
